---
title: "‘Will no one do likewise?:  A Tale of East London Life’"
---

## ‘Will no one do likewise?:  A Tale of East London Life’

**Author:** Ann Maria Carter Smith
**Date:** 1859
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i>  (January-September 1859).

### Notes

Reprinted in <i>Lucy and Christian Wainwright and Other Tales</i> (London 1863). By the Author of <i>Aggesden Vicarage, The Wynnes</i> and <i>Mildred’s Last</i> Night’.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
